359 J1550D_INTRNL_BLEDG_CD J1550D_INTRNL_BLEDG_CD J1550D Problem Conditions: Internal Bleeding Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had internal bleeding. -=Not assessed/no information

360 J1550Z_NO_PRBLM_COND_CD J1550Z_NO_PRBLM_COND_CD J1550Z Problem Conditions: None of Above Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates that the resident had none of the above problem conditions.
